song.title: Praise You In This Storm
song.author: Bernie Herms and Mark Hall
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Bm G D I was sure by now, God, You would have reached down . A5 Bm And wiped our tears away, stepped in and saved the day. . G D A5 But once again, I say amen and it's still raining.
[P] . Em G5 And as the thunder rolls, I barely hear . D You whisper through the rain, . A5 “I'm with You”. . Em G5 And as Your mercy falls, |I raise my hands . D And praise the God who gives . A And takes away.
[C] .Bm G D And I'll praise You in this storm, And I will lift my hands . A5 Bm For You are who You are, No matter where I am.|| . G D And every tear I've cried |You hold in Your hand. . A5 Em G You never left my side. And though my heart is torn, . D A I will praise You in this storm.
[V2] I remember when |I stumbled in the wind, You heard my cry to You And raised me up again. My strength is almost gone, How can I carry on if I can't find You?|| .. .. ---
[B] .Bm G D I lift my eyes unto the hills, Where does my help come from? . A5 My help comes from the Lord, The maker of heaven and earth.
